verification.celoscan: not verified — requires CELOSCAN_API_KEY in env, then `npx hardhat verify --network celoSepolia 0x66D6562ce55955A0d80C3DC81D50A67eA1129Ad8 0x01C5C0122039549AD1493B8220cABEdD739BC44E 0x168025fD748b63Cc6fB3bd59F197a6c79e6812c0 0x168025fD748b63Cc6fB3bd59F197a6c79e6812c0`

notes.operatorAndTreasury: Both set to the deployer's Sepolia testnet wallet. For mainnet, operator must remain the hot wallet while treasury must be the hardware wallet — they must be distinct addresses on mainnet deploy.
